name: AlphaClawXiv
description: Native OpenClaw OAuth, live AlphaXiv MCP paper discovery, PDF analysis, and repository-reading tools.

mcpUrl.label: AlphaXiv MCP URL
mcpUrl.help: Hosted AlphaXiv Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint.

serverName.label: MCP Server Name
serverName.help: Name used in OpenClaw's mcp.servers map.

connectionTimeoutMs.label: Connection Timeout
connectionTimeoutMs.help: Timeout used by OpenClaw when connecting to the hosted AlphaXiv MCP endpoint.
